name: Exfiltration Over Other Network Medium
description: Detects data exfiltration over Bluetooth, WiFi direct, or other alternate network mediums
query:
// Detect alternate network medium usage for data transfer
// Trigger on Bluetooth or WiFi direct file transfer utilities
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(bluetooth.*send|obexftp|wifi.*direct|hcitool|btobex|airdrop)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 300 seconds
